svg.text: uv run python -m micar_linter examples/incomplete.json

Whitepaper type: ART
Pass: 1 | Review: 12 | Missing: 4 | Blockers: 13

Section: 'summary' (4 words)

- Missing review terms: summary, key information.
[MISS ] [BLOCKER] COMMON.RISK_WARNING Mandatory risk warning statement

- Section is empty or absent.
[REVIEW] [MAJOR ] COMMON.NOTIFICATION_DATE Date of notification to the NCA
Cite: Art. 8 Abs. 1, Art. 17, Art. 49 MiCAR
- Section is thin: 1 word, expected at least 5.
